creator: runge@rostock.zgdv.de
text:
"make fetch" gets a "temporarily moved" on old MASTER_SITE

Fix: 

change MASTER_SITE from www.egd.igd.fhg.de to www.rostock.zgdv.de
How-To-Repeat: 
	"make fetch" in /usr/ports/audio/xmradio
	Sorry for not testing my initial change request for xmradio update
	good enough...
